summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of LOGITAG Premium SaaS - All 4 new pages (Utilisateurs, Paramètres, Rapports, Gateway) are fully functional and properly connected to the router. All 11 sidebar navigation items are present. All previously working pages (Dashboard, Assets, Map, Activity, Alerts, Zones) continue to work correctly.

minor.impact: Real-time features affected but core functionality works

minor.issue: 500 errors on some external API calls
minor.impact: Some data may not load, but app handles gracefully

passed_tests: Login flow with admin/user@1234 credentials - redirects to /tagdashboard/index
Sidebar shows all 11 navigation items: Dashboard, Carte, Assets, Zones, Activité, Alertes, Utilisateurs, Gateway, Rapports, Clients, Paramètres

Utilisateurs page (/view/staff/index): Title 'Utilisateurs', 15 users total, stats (15 Total, 14 Actifs, 1 Inactifs), search input, table with avatar/name/login/tag/fonction/dates/statut, Excel/PDF export buttons, Nouveau button
Paramètres page (/menu/setup): Title 'Paramètres', 4 tabs (Entreprise, Familles, Statuts, Corbeille)
Settings > Entreprise tab: Shows company info (Nom: LOGITAG, Secteur: Tracking BLE / IoT, Contact: admin@logitag.ch, Adresse: Suisse)
Settings > Familles tab: Object filter chips (Tag, Engin), search input, famille list (empty for current filter)
Settings > Statuts tab: Object filter chips, table with 3 statut items (T1, T2, T3) with columns NOM DU STATUT, COULEUR, ICÔNE, ACTION
Settings > Corbeille tab: Table with 50 deleted/inactive items with columns NOM À AFFICHER, SOURCE, ACTION
Gateway page (/gateway/index): Title 'Gateway', 5 passerelles configurées, stats (5 Total, 5 En ligne, 0 Hors ligne), Leaflet map with markers, gateway list panel with 5 items
Rapports page (/rapport/index): Title 'Rapports', 3 report type cards (Présence, Mouvement, Localisation), Nouveau rapport button, search input, 214 report items in list
Dashboard page: Working correctly with KPI cards and widgets
Assets page: Working correctly with card grid and filters
Map page: Working correctly with fullscreen Leaflet map
Activity page: Working correctly with timeline events
Alerts page: Working correctly with alert items
Zones page: Working correctly with 4 polygon zones on map
critical_code_review_comments: All 4 new pages (PremiumUsers, PremiumSettings, PremiumReports, PremiumGateway) are properly imported in components.js
Route mappings correctly set: 'view/staff/index' -> PremiumUsers, 'menu/setup' -> PremiumSettings, 'rapport/index' -> PremiumReports, 'gateway/index' -> PremiumGateway
EXTRA_MENU in config.js correctly adds the new menu items (Utilisateurs, Paramètres, Gateway, Rapports)
All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing
PremiumUsers uses Teams Redux slice with real API data
PremiumSettings uses Famillies and Statut slices with real API data
PremiumReports uses rapports slice with real API data (214 reports)
PremiumGateway uses gateway slice + LogsTracking with real API data (5 gateways)
All pages have proper loading states and empty state handling
seed_data_creation: None - using external API data via proxy
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 10 premium pages fully tested and working. Key routes: Dashboard at /tagdashboard/index, Assets at /view/engin/index, Map at /tour/index, Activity at /LOGS/index, Alerts at /alert/index, Zones at /Geofence/index, Utilisateurs at /view/staff/index, Paramètres at /menu/setup, Rapports at /rapport/index, Gateway at /gateway/index. Login credentials: admin/user@1234. External API is slow (15-20 seconds for data load). All pages use real Redux slices connecting to external API via proxy.

parametres_page.title: Paramètres
parametres_page.data_source: Famillies and Statut Redux slices (real API)
